title: Didymopanax fruticosus
taxonomy: Didymopanax fruticosus is classified within the plant family Araliaceae, commonly known as the ginseng or ivy family. This plant is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America, where it has been traditionally used for medicinal and culinary purposes. As a member of the Araliaceae family, Didymopanax fruticosus is closely related to other plants such as Panax ginseng and Polyscias scutellaria. The plant is often cultivated for its edible fruits and leaves, which are rich in vitamins and minerals. In terms of its botanical classification, Didymopanax fruticosus is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the genus Didymopanax.
